LEF1 is a transcription factor marking naive T cells and early T cell progenitors
TCF7 is a key transcription factor for naive and stem-like memory T cells
CCR7 is a chemokine receptor marking naive and central memory T cells
SELL (CD62L) is a selectin marking naive T cells that home to lymph nodes
BACH2 is a transcription factor maintaining naive T cell quiescence
NELL2 is highly expressed in naive T cells and distinguishes them from effector subsets
IL7R is essential for naive T cell survival and homeostasis
MAL is a lipid raft protein enriched in naive T cells
CAMK4 is a calcium-dependent kinase highly expressed in naive T cells
LTB (lymphotoxin beta) is expressed by naive and resting T cells
CD3D confirms T cell lineage identity
LDHB is metabolically enriched in naive T cells relying on oxidative metabolism
LAMA2 (laminin alpha-2) is a basement membrane component characteristic of adipocytes/preadipocytes
CIDEA is a lipid droplet-associated protein marking brown/beige adipocytes
PDK4 regulates fatty acid oxidation and is highly expressed in adipocytes
PPARGC1A (PGC1-alpha) is a master regulator of mitochondrial biogenesis in adipocytes
FBXO32 (atrogin-1) is involved in metabolic regulation in adipose tissue
ZBTB16 (PLZF) is a transcription factor involved in adipogenesis
FKBP5 is a glucocorticoid-responsive gene highly expressed in adipocytes
ACSL4 is a fatty acid-CoA ligase involved in lipid metabolism in adipocytes
GPC3 is expressed in preadipocytes and involved in adipose tissue development
ACACB (acetyl-CoA carboxylase beta) is a key enzyme in fatty acid metabolism in adipocytes
PDE3B mediates insulin signaling in adipocytes regulating lipolysis
EBF2 is a master transcription factor for brown/beige adipocyte differentiation
PPARGC1A (PGC1-alpha) drives thermogenic gene programs in brown adipocytes
ESRRG is an orphan nuclear receptor involved in mitochondrial function in brown adipocytes
FABP4 is a fatty acid binding protein and canonical adipocyte marker
PRDM16 is a key transcriptional regulator of brown fat cell fate
LEPR (leptin receptor) is expressed on adipocyte progenitors and mature adipocytes
AQP7 is an aquaglyceroporin facilitating glycerol transport in adipocytes
BTNL9 is enriched in adipose tissue endothelial/stromal cells
CCDC3 is an adipocyte-secreted protein regulated by PPARgamma
PRKAR2B is a PKA regulatory subunit enriched in adipose tissue
RXRG is a nuclear receptor involved in adipocyte differentiation and lipid metabolism
RGS6 is a regulator of G-protein signaling highly expressed in pericytes/mural cells
FHOD3 is a formin involved in actin dynamics in contractile cells
ALPK3 is a kinase associated with cardiomyocyte/muscle cell function
SCN9A is a voltage-gated sodium channel expressed in excitable pericytes/mural cells
NTRK3 (TrkC) is a neurotrophin receptor expressed in pericytes and neural crest-derived cells
MEF2C is a transcription factor for muscle and vascular cell differentiation
ESRRG is an orphan nuclear receptor involved in metabolic regulation
EDIL3 is an integrin ligand expressed in vascular-associated cells
KCNAB1 is a potassium channel subunit expressed in excitable mural cells
ACTA2 expression indicates smooth muscle/pericyte contractile identity
DCN (decorin) is a canonical fibroblast marker and ECM proteoglycan
COL1A1 is a major collagen gene defining fibroblast identity
COL1A2 is a fibrillar collagen gene highly expressed by fibroblasts
PDGFRA is a canonical marker of fibroblasts and mesenchymal progenitors
LUM (lumican) is a small leucine-rich proteoglycan characteristic of fibroblasts
CXCL14 is a chemokine highly expressed by tissue-resident fibroblasts
THY1 (CD90) is a surface marker of fibroblasts and mesenchymal stem cells
FBLN1 (fibulin-1) is an ECM glycoprotein secreted by fibroblasts
CXCL12 (SDF-1) is a chemokine produced by stromal fibroblasts
PI16 marks universal/adventitial fibroblast populations
CD34 marks adventitial and interstitial fibroblast subsets
APOD is an apolipoprotein highly expressed by tissue fibroblasts
